SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractEngine
Sealed abstract base class for the Orasaka AI orchestration engine.
AdminRegistry
Thread-safe runtime store managing lock status for capabilities under Project Loom.
AdminRegistry.LockInfo
Immutable audit record for a capability lock.
AiClient
High-level Facade for developers to interact with the Orasaka AI Ecosystem.
AiController
GraphQL Controller that exposes the Orasaka AI capabilities as queries, mutations, and subscriptions.
AnalyzeAudioExtractRequest
Request payload for checking film audio extracts.
AnalyzeAudioExtractResponse
Response returned from film audio extract analysis.
AnalyzePosterRequest
Request payload for analyzing movie posters using Vision capabilities.
AnalyzePosterResponse
Response returned from movie poster Vision analysis.
AudioPreProcessor
Port interface for pre-processing audio input before cognitive analysis.
AuthContracts
Group of immutable authentication data contracts.
AuthContracts.LoginRequest
Request data containing credentials.
AuthContracts.OAuthRequest
Request data containing OAuth profile details.
AuthContracts.RegisterRequest
Request data containing registration details.
AuthContracts.RegisterResult
Result of registration indicating either success or failure.
AuthContracts.VerifyTokenRequest
Request payload for verifying account tokens.
Authority
Immutable security role representation for the Orasaka ecosystem.
AuthorityEntity
JPA Entity mapping the orasaka_authorities database table.
AuthorityRepository
JPA Repository for performing database operations on AuthorityEntity.
BackgroundScheduler
Scheduled background task processor for RAG ingestion pipelines.
CachingToolCallback
A caching decorator for ToolCallback.
ChatCompletedEvent
Immutable Spring Application Event emitted when an Orasaka chat request completes successfully.
ChatRequest
Unified chat request record for all AI interactions.
ChatRequest.ChatMessage
Represents an individual message in a chat history.
ChatResponse
Unified chat response record for all AI interactions.
ChatStreamController
REST controller exposing real-time Server-Sent Events (SSE) chat streaming and media analysis.
ChatStreamService
Service orchestrating AI chat streaming flows for SSE and GraphQL subscriptions.
Chunker
Interface representing a strategy to chunk raw data into Spring AI Document representations.
ChunkingStrategies
Pre-built, reusable chunking strategies library.
Context
Immutable context for Orasaka AI requests.
ContextInterceptor
Generic interceptor interface for prompt context enrichment and post-execution hooks.
CoreException
Base exception for the Orasaka CORS module.
CoreProperties
Configuration properties for Orasaka CORS (Cognitive Orchestration and Retrieval System).
CoreProperties.InterceptorConfig
Unified interceptor configuration for refiner and router pipeline stages.
CoreProperties.McpConfig
MCP (Model Context Protocol) configuration.
CoreProperties.OrchestrationConfig
Configuration for the cognitive prompt orchestration pipeline.
CoreProperties.ProviderConfig
Configuration for a specific AI provider.
CoreProperties.RagConfig
RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) configuration.
CoreProperties.SystemContextConfig
System context injector configuration details.
CoreProperties.UserContextConfig
User context resolver configuration details.
CoreProperties.VideoAnalysisConfig
Video analysis (vision input) configuration.
CoreProperties.VideoConfig
Partitioned video pipeline configuration (analysis vs generation).
CoreProperties.VideoGenerationConfig
Video generation (text-to-video output) configuration.
DefaultMcpOrchestrator
Default implementation for MCP Orchestrator.
DefaultOptions
Default record implementation of the Options configuration interface.
DefaultToolRegistry
Default implementation of ToolRegistry.
Engine
Concrete, final implementation of AbstractEngine.
GatewayApplication
Entry point for the Orasaka Gateway Backend-for-Frontend (BFF) application.
GatewayErrorResolver
Unified gateway exception resolver handling REST and GraphQL endpoints.
GatewayProperties
Configuration properties record for environment-driven Orasaka gateway settings.
GatewayProperties.CorsProperties
CORS policy configuration properties.
GatewayProperties.SecurityProperties
Security policy configuration properties.
GraphEngine
Short-circuit compilation engine resolving static configurations and runtime lock registries.
IdentityConfig
Spring Configuration for the orasaka-identity module.
IdentityInfrastructureProperties
Configuration properties for passive generic identity workflows in Orasaka.
IdentityInfrastructureProperties.EmailVerification
Settings for the email verification subsystem.
IdentityInfrastructureProperties.Interceptions
Settings for the user interception engine.
IdentityJpaConfiguration
JPA infrastructure configuration for the Orasaka gateway.
IdentityService
Core identity service responsible for user lifecycle management: profile resolution, self-service registration, preference persistence, password-based authentication, user interceptions, and token-based email verification.
ImagePreProcessor
Port interface for pre-processing image input before cognitive analysis.
ImageRequest
Unified image request record for multi-modal generation.
ImageResponse
Unified image response record.
InternalChatRequest
Internal engine-level chat request record.
InternalChatRequest.ChatMessage
Represents an individual message in the conversation history.
InternalChatResponse
Internal engine-level chat response record.
InternalImageRequest
Internal engine-level image generation request record.
InternalImageResponse
Internal engine-level image generation response record.
InternalSpeechRequest
Internal engine-level text-to-speech request record.
InvalidRequestException
Exception thrown when input parameters for a request or command are invalid or missing.
JsonMapConverter
JPA Attribute Converter that maps a Java Map to a JSON string column in the database.
JsonMapConverter
JPA Attribute Converter that maps a Java Map to a JSON string column in the database.
KnowledgeService
Service for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).
LocalVideoProcessor
Local adapter for video pre-processing.
McpOrchestrator
Orchestrator interface for MCP (Model Context Protocol).
McpService
Integration layer for MCP (Model Context Protocol).
MediaContracts
Group of immutable media data contracts for multi-modal ingestion.
MediaContracts.AnalyzeAudioRequest
Request containing base64 encoded audio track clip.
MediaContracts.AnalyzePosterRequest
Request containing base64 encoded poster image.
NodeState
Sealed interface representing the polymorphic state of a graph node in the Orasaka Operation Graph.
NodeState.Active
Active state — the capability is available for execution.
NodeState.Invisible
Invisible state — the capability is hidden from clients entirely (disabled in config).
NodeState.Locked
Locked state — the capability is temporarily disabled by an administrator.
OperationGraph
Immutable container for the compiled SDUI Operation Graph.
OperationGraphController
REST controller exposing the compiled capability Operation Graph matrix.
OperationNode
Defines a capability node inside the Orasaka Operation Graph.
Options
Unified options interface for Orasaka models.
OptionsMapper
Utility class responsible for mapping Orasaka options to Spring AI options.
OrasakaCoreConfiguration
Spring Boot @Configuration class for the orasaka-core module.
OrchestrationPipeline
Coordination manager for the prompt interceptor pipeline chain of responsibility.
PipelineInterceptors
Utility class with shared helper methods for the Context-Matrix orchestration pipeline.
ProcessedAudioPayload
Immutable payload carrying the transcribed text from a processed audio source.
ProcessedImagePayload
Immutable payload carrying processed image data and its dimensions.
ProcessedVideoPayload
Immutable payload carrying extracted keyframes and audio transcript from a processed video.
PromptContext
State machine context holding user and system matrices for prompt refinement and routing.
RateLimitConfig
Conditional configuration class for the dynamic rate limiting engine.
RateLimitProperties
Configuration properties record for environment-driven Orasaka rate limiting settings.
RateLimitTierEntity
JPA Entity mapping the orasaka_rate_limit_tiers database table.
RateLimitTierRepository
JPA Repository for performing database operations on RateLimitTierEntity.
Role
Domain-driven RBAC hierarchy using Java 21 Sealed Interfaces.
Role.Admin
Represents the Admin role in the system.
Role.Guest
Represents the Guest role in the system.
Role.User
Represents the User role in the system.
SecurityConfig
Stateless Spring Security configuration for the orasaka-gateway module.
SpeechRequest
Unified speech request record for Text-To-Speech generation.
SystemContextProvider
Interface to provide external system context signals to the prompt matrix pipeline.
TargetExecutionUri
Carries coordinates for executing a specific graph operation endpoint.
ToolCacheEntity
JPA Entity mapping the orasaka_tools_cache database table.
ToolCacheId
Embeddable composite primary key class for ToolCacheEntity.
ToolCacheRepository
JPA Repository for performing database operations on ToolCacheEntity.
ToolCacheService
Service managing multi-tier caching with Caffeine and PostgreSQL storage.
ToolCacheService.CacheEntry
Represents a cached response entry.
ToolRagSourceEntity
JPA Entity mapping the orasaka_tools_rag_source database table.
ToolRagSourceRepository
JPA Repository for performing database operations on ToolRagSourceEntity.
ToolRegistry
Registry interface for local Java methods to be used as tools by the AI models.
ToolsProperties
Configuration registry for Orasaka Tools, including caching and RAG ingestion properties.
ToolsProperties.CacheConfig
Configuration settings for caching tool execution results.
ToolsProperties.RagConfig
Configuration settings for RAG database ingestion for a specific tool.
ToolsProperties.ToolConfig
Configuration settings for a specific tool.
ToolsSystemContextProvider
Downstream system context provider implementation for tools execution matrix data.
User
Immutable domain representation of an Orasaka user, carrying identity, security authorities, and multi-modal AI execution preferences.
UserAlreadyExistsException
Exception thrown when a user registration fails because the requested email is already registered.
UserEntity
JPA Entity mapping the orasaka_users database table.
UserInterceptionEntity
JPA Entity mapping the orasaka_user_interceptions database table.
UserInterceptionId
Embeddable composite primary key class for UserInterceptionEntity.
UserInterceptionRepository
JPA Repository for performing database operations on UserInterceptionEntity.
UserRegisteredEvent
Event published when a new user registers in the Orasaka identity module.
UserRepository
JPA Repository for performing database operations on UserEntity.
VerificationTokenEntity
JPA Entity mapping the orasaka_verification_tokens database table.
VerificationTokenRepository
JPA Repository for performing database operations on VerificationTokenEntity.
VideoPreProcessor
Port interface for pre-processing video input before cognitive analysis.
VideoRequest
Immutable record carrying the prompt, parameters, and security context for Text-to-Video generation.
VideoResponse
Immutable response payload containing generated video bytes and target format.
VideoService
Service for AI-powered video generation via the LocalAI bare-metal REST API.
